items.scenario: You recently enrolled in a weeknight cooking class at a downtown culinary center. The welcome message gave the address but left out the start time and the ingredients you should bring. The first session is on Tuesday.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Radcliffe. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain which cooking class you enrolled in
Describe the details missing from the welcome message
Inquire about the ingredients to bring before Tuesday
items.subject: Cooking class start details

items.scenario: You recently booked a guided kayak tour along the coast for next Saturday morning. The company's confirmation listed a meeting point that has since closed for construction. You are unsure where the group will now gather or whether the time has changed.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Sorensen. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain which kayak tour you reserved
Describe the problem with the listed meeting point
Request a confirmed location and start time
items.subject: Kayak tour booking question

items.scenario: You are a member of the campus film society, which screens classic movies every Friday. This week's screening was canceled without notice after you had already arrived at the hall. No replacement date has been announced to members.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Beaumont. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe what happened at Friday's canceled screening
Explain how the lack of notice affected members
Request a rescheduled date for the film
items.subject: Film society membership issue

items.scenario: Your apartment building's front-door intercom has been broken for over a week, so visitors and deliveries cannot buzz your unit. You have missed two parcels already. The building office has not posted any repair notice.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Whitaker. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain how long the intercom has been broken
Describe the missed deliveries this has caused
Ask when the intercom will be repaired
items.subject: Broken building entry intercom

items.scenario: You are a swim-pass holder at the community aquatic center downtown. Your pass expires at the end of the month, but the online renewal page keeps rejecting your card. The staff line has gone unanswered all week.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Underwood. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the problem with the online renewal page
Mention that the staff line has gone unanswered
Request another way to renew your pass
items.subject: Community pool pass renewal

items.scenario: Your chemistry lab is scheduled for Thursday afternoons, which now overlaps with a required seminar added to your timetable this term. A different lab section meets on Monday mornings and appears to have open seats. The change deadline is Friday.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Nakamura. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why your current lab section no longer works
Describe the Monday section you would prefer
Request a transfer before Friday's deadline
items.subject: Lab section change request

items.scenario: You recently found out that a band you and a friend both like will play in your city next month. Tickets go on sale this weekend and the good seats sell out quickly. Your friend does not know about the show yet.
items.direction: Write an email to Priya. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain which concert is coming to town
Describe why buying tickets early matters
Suggest a time to book seats together
items.subject: Weekend concert plans

items.scenario: You recently reserved a spot in a weekend botanical painting workshop at the city gardens. The confirmation charged you for a full-day session, but the schedule online now shows only a morning class. You planned your whole Saturday around it.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Ashford. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the mismatch between the charge and the schedule
Explain how the shorter session affects your plans
Request a correction or a partial refund
items.subject: Garden workshop schedule question

items.scenario: You are a subscriber to an audiobook service that offered a discounted first year. Your account was just charged the full renewal price without any reminder beforehand. The confirmation email arrived only after the payment had gone through.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Calderon. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the unexpected renewal charge on your account
Mention that no reminder was sent beforehand
Suggest a fair resolution for the overcharge
items.subject: Audiobook renewal charge

items.scenario: You are a season subscriber to the local theater's Saturday evening series. The seats assigned for the coming production are behind a pillar that blocks much of the stage. Your subscription was supposed to guarantee an unobstructed view.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Pennington. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problem with the assigned seats
Explain why the location does not match your subscription
Request seats with an unobstructed view
items.subject: Theater subscription seat change
